Law 11 - offside
A player in an offside position is only penalized if, at the moment the ball touches or is played by one of his team, he is, in the opinion of the referee, involved in active play by:
Interfering with play or
Interfering with an opponent or
Gaining an advantage by being in that position

越位犯規

若在隊友踢球或觸球時*，身處越位位置的球員只在有參與比賽時才會被判越位
犯規：皮球被對方球員蓄意救球後反彈

其實球例中球員處於越位位置並未係犯規，而係要觸犯以下IA、IO 或 GA 先算係犯規。今晚旁述連講幾次應該係Interfering with play，但皇馬球員冇投訴所以好難理解，而跟據球例，其實應該係Interfering with opponent 先正確…

球例分享
IA- interfering with play
越位位置球員參與比賽，簡單黎講就係掂波。
• interfering with play by playing or touching a ball passed or touched by a team-mate

IO- interfering with opponent
簡單黎講就係指越位球員阻擋防守球員爭球（呢個case就係佢阻擋左皇馬龍門出迎）
interfering with an opponent by:
• preventing an opponent from playing or being able to play the ball by clearly obstructing the opponent’s line of vision
• challenging an opponent for the ball
• clearly attempting to play a ball which is close when this action impacts on an opponent
• making an obvious action which clearly impacts on the ability of an or opponent to play the ball

GA- Gaining advantage
越位球員因處於越位位置而取得利益，簡單講就係執雞補射等等
gaining an advantage by playing the ball or interfering with an opponent when it has:
• rebounded or been deflected off the goalpost, crossbar, match official or an opponent
• been deliberately saved by any opponent
